targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(AVG(response_time_ms),0)::int AS value FROM retrievalmetric WHERE timestamp > now() - interval '7 days'
SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS value FROM retrievalmetric WHERE timestamp > now() - interval '7 days'
SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(rating)::numeric,2),0) AS value FROM feedback WHERE created_at > now() - interval '7 days'

SELECT created_at::date AS date, ROUND(faithfulness::numeric,3) AS faithfulness, ROUND(relevance::numeric,3) AS relevance, ROUND(context_precision::numeric,3) AS precision, ROUND(answer_correctness::numeric,3) AS correctness, ROUND(context_recall::numeric,3) AS recall, num_samples, top_k, chunk_size FROM evalresult ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT timestamp AS time, vector_count AS value FROM retrievalmetric WHERE timestamp > now() - interval '7 days' ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp AS time, bm25_count AS value FROM retrievalmetric WHERE timestamp > now() - interval '7 days' ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp AS time, graph_count AS value FROM retrievalmetric WHERE timestamp > now() - interval '7 days' ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT response_time_ms FROM retrievalmetric WHERE timestamp > now() - interval '7 days'
SELECT timestamp AS time, overlap_vector_bm25::float AS value FROM retrievalmetric WHERE timestamp > now() - interval '7 days' ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp AS time, vector_only::float AS value FROM retrievalmetric WHERE timestamp > now() - interval '7 days' ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp AS time, bm25_only::float AS value FROM retrievalmetric WHERE timestamp > now() - interval '7 days' ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT DATE(created_at) AS time, ROUND(AVG(rating)::numeric,2) AS value FROM feedback WHERE created_at > now() - interval '7 days' GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY time
SELECT fetched_at::date AS date, total_input_tokens, total_output_tokens, ROUND(total_cost::numeric,4) AS cost_usd FROM langfuse_snapshot ORDER BY fetched_at DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT fetched_at::date AS date, ROUND(vector_search_avg_ms::numeric,1) AS vector_ms, ROUND(bm25_search_avg_ms::numeric,1) AS bm25_ms, ROUND(graph_expand_avg_ms::numeric,1) AS graph_ms, ROUND(llm_inference_avg_ms::numeric,1) AS llm_ms FROM langfuse_snapshot ORDER BY fetched_at DESC LIMIT 10
